creator: goutam.paruchuri@yahoo.com
text:
Hi,

Iam trying to boot FreeBSD 6.2 from the CD on a Dell Desktop Vostro 200. 
I cannot get to the sysinstall screen.
The error is as follows.
./sysinstall running as init on vty0
and is stuck there forever.

I tried various CPU /Power options in the BIOS but does not work.

any help

How-To-Repeat: always exist.
